actions.execute: Claim or continue a sovereign bead by running AutoBot/Hermes as an ephemeral worker behind checker-gated retries.

inputs.timeout: optional number of seconds per Hermes attempt
inputs.startup_timeout: optional number of seconds to wait for the Hermes prompt
inputs.checker_timeout: optional number of seconds per checker run
inputs.worker_note: optional string containing only immediate Hall/PennyOne context for the active bead

outputs.outcome: NO_ACTIONABLE_BEADS or READY_FOR_REVIEW or RESOLVED or BLOCKED
